## Language

<!-- e.g. "French (fr)", "Swahili (sw)", "Arabic (ar)" -->

## Domain(s)

<!-- Which domain(s) are you translating or reporting an issue with?
     e.g. "Governance", "Safeguarding", or "All" -->

## Type of request

- [ ] I want to claim a new translation (language + domain not yet started)
- [ ] I want to continue an in-progress translation
- [ ] I found an error in an existing translation

## Your qualifications

<!-- Are you a native speaker? Do you have subject-matter expertise in this domain?
     A native-speaker review is required before a translation is merged. -->

## Additional notes
